prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild interior, cinematic anime style. Renji Dawnblade, a hero in a crimson cloak and leather armor, approaches Mika Brightford at her workbench. Renji holds out his Dawnblade broadsword toward Mika for a final gear inspection before a mission. Mika, wearing a tool-belted apron with ash-stained gloves, looks up from her ledger, smiles, and reaches out to grasp the hilt of the sword Renji is presenting. Soft guild lighting, high detail, no text, no watermarks.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot. Mika takes the broadsword from Renji and places it securely on her master's anvil. She uses a small precision tool to tighten a fitting on the pommel while Renji watches with a confident, focused expression. They share a brief, professional nod of mutual trust, finalizing the gear preparation. Consistent character appearance, cinematic anime lighting, no text, no watermarks.
